title: nasturtium atrovirens
intro: Nasturtium atrovirens, also known as the green flowered nasturtium, is a perennial herb in the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its bright green, rounded leaves and delicate, greenish-yellow flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, attributed to the presence of glucosinolates and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Nasturtium atrovirens are said to include reducing inflammation, treating colds and fever, and supporting the immune system, as well as having potential antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal dosing.
